title: D0 Variable-List Contracts
source_policy: Derived from the byte-equivalent D0 source scaffold. This records list boundaries, consumer-backed field names, pointer ownership, and decoded entry values only; it does not commit raw table bytes.

enemy_placement_group_list.consumer: C0:2668 can replace $4A70 with this byte when the gate flag is set

enemy_placement_weighted_entry.consumer: C0:2668 adds this byte to the running selection threshold
C0:2668 stores this as the selected BTL_ENTRY_PTR_TABLE row id in $4A72

enemy_battle_group_entry.consumer: C2:2F38 repeats the enemy id this many times; C2:EEE7 treats FF as terminator
C2:2F38 stages this id into $9F8C; C2:EEE7 maps it through D5 enemy config
